videos.title: Northwoods Experience: Finlandia Ski Marathon Celebrates 40th Year
videos.description:
Originally aired February 21, 2023 on Lakeland News

- - - - - - - - -

videos.transcript:
skiers made their way over the hill and
across the trails at the 40th annual
Finlandia skiing event held at Buena
Vista Ski Resort North of Bemidji the
event saw over 100 participants go the
extra kilometer to celebrate this
Milestone here's this week's Northwoods
experience
[Music]
of different ages and experiences took
to the trails for the 40th Finlandia ski
event this past weekend there's a lot of
big ski marathons all over the state in
the Midwest and a lot of them haven't
been around nearly as long as the
Finlandia we've got a bunch of people
from Canada coming down some people from
the Twin Cities coming up Fargo but from
all over the place it's good to see that
the community support something like
this for 40 some years
whether it was for the first place
finish or just a personal best time
faces new and old looked to celebrate
this Milestone it just shows how much
the how much this race means to people
how much the organizers have put it put
effort into it every year it's an all
ages event it's a great chance to kind
of test your skills and it's got some of
the best prizes in all of cross-country
skiing well recognizing the
accomplishments of 40 Years of Finlandia
organizers managed to work around
challenges on and off the ski Trail
including the drop in participation
numbers races like this there's always
going to be fluctuations a couple of
years that are down couple years that
are high so participation has dropped
over the years only because you know
there's more and more races all around
the state today alone I think there's
five different races within the Midwest
here that people can choose from
members this year this year participants
who cross that finish line now look to
the Future for Finlandia in the future
we'd like to see the numbers go back up
again so you know if we could do you
know a little more cross you know a
promotion and things like that and
organize with other races and trying to
get their numbers back up but other than
that I mean we're really happy with the
way things turn out
Lakeland news is member supported
content please consider supporting
Lakeland news today

videos.title: Sweden's Ebba Andersson topples head-over-skis in relay | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
The gold-medal favorite in the women's 4x7.5 cross-country skiing relay fell from the pack when the slushy snow caught a Swedish skier and their ski technician. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #CrossCountrySkiing

videos.transcript:
The two top teams in this event
historically are at the front of the
race. Norway in first, SWEDEN HERE. OH
NO, ANOTHER CRASH.
Head over heels.
>> She's lost her ski.
>> Eva Anderson. DISASTER FOR THE TOP
RANKED SWEDES, THE heavy favorites.
>> And just seemed to rip the ski off of
her foot. We we get the replay now. I
think that snowplow was really what set
her up for this. That tripper ski and
she did a full flip and that just ripped
the binding right off. You can see the
binding actually still on her foot
and her teammate Freda Carlson was
watching in the transition area.
And now she knows just how devastating
that is going to be. Oh, and even the
technician goes down. Oh my word.

videos.title: 36th Annual Finlandia Cross Country Races Ready To Kick Off
videos.transcript:
it's the night before the big race as
one of America's premier cross-country
skiing events gets ready to hit the
trails of northern Minnesota the 36th
annual Minnesota Finlandia kicks off
Saturday morning at 8 a.m. followed by
many other ski events skiers from all
over the region will take part in the
annual cross-country ski race the snow
and cold temperatures this winter has
made ideal conditions for this year's
big event conditions this year are
fantastic this is the first year in four
years that we've been able to ski the
full course the past three years ago we
were cancelled in the past two years
we've been half course so we're really
excited to have a full course finally up
here in northern Minnesota now
throughout race two anyone interested in
doing some downhill skiing or tubing
Buena Vista will be open for regular
business as well if you enjoyed this
segment of Lakeland news please consider
making a tax-deductible contribution to
Lakeland PBS
you

videos.title: Reindeer Race
videos.description: Santa’s not the only person with reindeer. Here, people in the far north of Europe race each other on skis while being pulled by reindeer.
